rows.label: qev086605_MSG0001
rows.name: Doug![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0002
rows.name:
There you are. Thanks for clearing
out the riffraff up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0003
rows.name: Sure—how's Iriina?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'll be fine. Doug already took
care of all the key repairs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0005
rows.name: All right, Doug![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0006
rows.name: Nah, I mean, c'mon—it's the least I could do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0007
rows.name:
Especially while you all were busy up
there kickin' indigen asses, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0008
rows.name:
You dropped this. You had
us all worried, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0009
rows.name: Thanks, Colonel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0010
rows.name: Lieutenaaaaaant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0011
rows.name: Huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0012
rows.name: Look who decided to show up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0013
rows.name:
Wha—? No, I... We split up, looking for parts,
and then, next thing I know I got this SOS, and—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0014
rows.name: And you're LATE, Gwin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0015
rows.name: Aaand I'm late.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0016
rows.name:
Cut him some slack— he must've really hauled
it here with those stubby legs of his.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0017
rows.name:
It doesn't matter you weren't here
first, Gwin. I'm just glad you're here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0018
rows.name: W-well, sure...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm glad, too—because now you can carry the
lieutenant all the way back to the city for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086605_MSG0020
rows.name: Y-yes, sir![ST:wait ]
